subcodes.first_line: O ye dear sons and beloved daughters of Abdul-Baha!  When the days that I was your associate and intimate pass before the mind, the heart is stirred into cheerfulness
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پسران محترم و دختران عزیز عبدالبهاء روزگاری را که با شما همدم و همراز بودم
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for specific individuals; groups
